from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

def build_template(ws):
    ws.title = "製造指図書"

    # Column widths (A=spacer, B..., last=spacer)
    # Total ~14 columns
    col_widths = {
        1: 2,    # spacer
        2: 8,    # 手配No label
        3: 12,   # 手配No value
        4: 4,    # sub
        5: 8,    # 発行日 label
        6: 12,   # 発行日 value
        7: 8,    # (barcode area)
        8: 8,
        9: 8,    # 作成者 label
        10: 2,   # spacer
    }
    # Redefine with more columns for accuracy
    # Let's use 12 columns
    col_widths = {
        1: 2,    # spacer left
        2: 10,   # label col
        3: 14,   # value col
        4: 4,    # small
        5: 8,    # label
        6: 12,   # value
        7: 8,    # label
        8: 12,   # value
        9: 6,    # 作成者
        10: 2,   # spacer right
    }
    for col, width in col_widths.items():
        ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col)].width = width

    # Row heights
    row_heights = {
        1: 20,   # 製造指図書 title + barcode
        2: 18,   # 手配No
        3: 18,   # 手配先
        4: 18,   # 品目CD
        5: 18,   # 品目名
        6: 18,   # 手配内容
        7: 18,   # ロットNo
        8: 20,   # 調合票 title
        9: 18,   # header row (成分名 etc)
        10: 22,  # data row 1
        11: 22,  # data row 2
        12: 18,
        13: 18,
        14: 18,
        15: 18,
        16: 18,
        17: 18,
        18: 18,
        19: 18,
        20: 18,
        21: 18,
        22: 18,
        23: 18,
        24: 18,
        25: 18,
        26: 20,  # 備考
    }
    for row, height in row_heights.items():
        ws.row_dimensions[row].height = height

    num_rows = 26
    num_cols = 10

    # 1. Apply thin border to every cell
    thin = Side(style='thin')
    border = Border(top=thin, bottom=thin, left=thin, right=thin)
    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=num_rows, min_col=1, max_col=num_cols):
        for cell in row:
            cell.border = border

    # Helper
    def sc(row, col, value, bold=False, align='left', size=10):
        cell = ws.cell(row=row, column=col)
        cell.value = value
        cell.font = Font(bold=bold, size=size, name='MS Gothic')
        ha = align if align in ('left','center','right') else 'left'
        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal=ha, vertical='center', wrap_text=True)

    # Light gray fill for label cells
    gray_fill = PatternFill(fill_type='solid', fgColor='D9D9D9')

    # Row 1: 製造指図書 title + barcode area
    sc(1, 2, '製造指図書', bold=True, align='center', size=14)
    # barcode label area - no fill needed

    # Row 2: 手配No | value | | 発行日 | value | | | 作成者
    sc(2, 2, '手配No.', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(2, 5, '発行日', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(2, 9, '作成者', bold=False, align='center')
    ws.cell(row=2, column=2).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=2, column=5).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=2, column=9).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 3: 手配先 | value | | 手配納期
    sc(3, 2, '手配先', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(3, 7, '手配納期', bold=False, align='center')
    ws.cell(row=3, column=2).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=3, column=7).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 4: 品目CD | value | 工順 | value | 発注手配数 | value
    sc(4, 2, '品目CD', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(4, 5, '工順', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(4, 7, '発注手配数', bold=False, align='center')
    ws.cell(row=4, column=2).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=4, column=5).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=4, column=7).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 5: 品目名 | value | | 製番 | value
    sc(5, 2, '品目名', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(5, 7, '製番', bold=False, align='center')
    ws.cell(row=5, column=2).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=5, column=7).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 6: 手配内容 | value | | 完成入庫 | value
    sc(6, 2, '手配内容', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(6, 7, '完成入庫', bold=False, align='center')
    ws.cell(row=6, column=2).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=6, column=7).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 7: ロットNo. | value | | 完成日 | value
    sc(7, 2, 'ロットNo.', bold=False, align='center')
    sc(7, 7, '完成日', bold=False, align='center')
    ws.cell(row=7, column=2).fill = gray_fill
    ws.cell(row=7, column=7).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 8: 調合票 title + 責任者
    sc(8, 2, '調合票', bold=True, align='center', size=13)
    sc(8, 9, '責任者', bold=False, align='center')
    ws.cell(row=8, column=9).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 9: table headers
    sc(9, 2, '成分名', bold=True, align='center')
    sc(9, 5, '原単位', bold=True, align='center')
    sc(9, 6, '分量', bold=True, align='center')
    sc(9, 7, '秤量者', bold=True, align='center')
    sc(9, 8, '原料ロット', bold=True, align='center')
    sc(9, 9, '確認者', bold=True, align='center')
    for col in [2, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9]:
        ws.cell(row=9, column=col).fill = gray_fill

    # Row 26: 備考
    sc(26, 2, '備考', bold=False, align='left')
    ws.cell(row=26, column=2).fill = gray_fill

    # Merges - LAST
    # Row 1: title spans cols 2-6, barcode spans 7-9
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=1, start_column=2, end_row=1, end_column=6)
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=1, start_column=7, end_row=1, end_column=9)

    # Row 2: 手配No value cols 3-4, 発行日 value cols 6, 作成者 spans rows 2-3 col 9
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=2, start_column=3, end_row=2, end_column=4)
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=2, start_column=6, end_row=2, end_column=8)
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=2, start_column=9, end_row=3, end_column=9)

    # Row 3: 手配先 value cols 3-6, 手配納期 value col 8
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=3, start_column=3, end_row=3, end_column=6)
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=3, start_column=8, end_row=3, end_column=8)

    # Row 4: 品目CD value cols 3-4, 工順 value col 6, 発注手配数 value col 8
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=4, start_column=3, end_row=4, end_column=4)

    # Row 5: 品目名 value cols 3-6, 製番 value col 8
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=5, start_column=3, end_row=5, end_column=6)

    # Row 6: 手配内容 value cols 3-6, 完成入庫 value col 8
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=6, start_column=3, end_row=6, end_column=6)

    # Row 7: ロットNo value cols 3-6, 完成日 value col 8
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=7, start_column=3, end_row=7, end_column=6)

    # Row 8: 調合票 title cols 2-8, 責任者 spans rows 8-9 col 9
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=8, start_column=2, end_row=8, end_column=8)
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=8, start_column=9, end_row=9, end_column=9)

    # Row 9: 成分名 cols 2-4
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=9, start_column=2, end_row=9, end_column=4)

    # Data rows 10-25: 成分名 cols 2-4
    for r in range(10, 26):
        ws.merge_cells(start_row=r, start_column=2, end_row=r, end_column=4)

    # Row 26: 備考 cols 2-9
    ws.merge_cells(start_row=26, start_column=2, end_row=26, end_column=9)

    # Spacer cols 1 and 10 - remove borders visually by making them no border
    no_border = Border()
    for r in range(1, num_rows + 1):
        ws.cell(row=r, column=1).border = no_border
        ws.cell(row=r, column=10).border = no_border

    # Page setup
    ws.page_setup.paperSize = 9
    ws.page_setup.fitToPage = True
    ws.page_setup.fitToWidth = 1
    ws.page_setup.fitToHeight = 1
    ws.page_setup.orientation = "portrait"
    ws.page_margins.left = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.right = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.top = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.bottom = 0.5

if __name__ == '__main__':
    from openpyxl import Workbook
    wb = Workbook()
    ws = wb.active
    build_template(ws)
    wb.save('製造指図書_template.xlsx')
